news.title: Musk texted OpenAI's Brockman about settlement two days before trial began
news.summary: Elon Musk co-founded OpenAI in 2015 and sued the company, President Greg Brockman and CEO Sam Altman in 2024.

news.title: EBay pops as Ryan Cohen says GameStop could issue stock to pay for takeover of much bigger retailer
news.summary: GameStop made a takeover bid for eBay, offering $125 per share in a cash-and-stock deal. The offer values the e-commerce platform at roughly $55.5 billion.

news.title: U.S. military denies Iran's claim it struck American warship in Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Iran has blocked tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz since the U.S. and Israel started the war in late February. The move has resulted in supply and price shocks.

news.title: Bret Taylor's Sierra raises nearly $1 billion months after last capital push
news.summary: Sierra's $950 million Series E funding round was led by Tiger and Google's GV, with participation from Benchmark, Sequoia, Greenoaks and others.

news.title: ‘Misplaced euphoria’: Markets are sleepwalking into a recession amid Iran war oil price shock
news.summary: strategists warn that investors are downplaying the impact of soaring oil prices. US equities hit fresh highs, with the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq both up more than 1%.

news.title: Tesla just hit a ‘symbolic’ self-driving milestone. Real-world success will be tougher.
news.summary: Tesla has reached the threshold Musk once said would be required to achieve “safe unsupervised self-driving,” but the company still faces various hurdles.

news.title: Global oil prices climb back above $110 a barrel after disputed report of Iran strike on U.S. warship
news.summary: Oil is off to a volatile start to the week on a disputed report of a strike on a U.S. Navy ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Become a ‘lazy’ millionaire: This one habit can add a 20% bonus to your retirement
news.summary: The S&P 500 just banked its best month since 2020. But to keep those gains, stop celebrating and focus long-term.

news.title: Meet the unsinkable U.S. economy — oil prices are surging, Iran tensions are rising, but it won’t crack
news.summary: Nothing in the turbulent past year has poked a hole in the seemingly unsinkable U.S. economy. High tariffs, stubborn inflation, government shutdowns, war with Iran, rising oil prices have all contributed.

news.title: Apple just gave a clue that a big AI acquisition may be in the cards
news.summary: Apple is retiring its net-cash-neutral target. Some suspect the company will look to conduct more transformative M&A, beyond the smaller deals it made in the past.
